Fear and Greed is at
27
(Fear).
BTC fell to $66K, extending its slide below the $68K level it had
briefly steadied at, now sitting at its lowest point since early
April. Eleven straight days of ETF outflows have pulled $3.45
billion from Bitcoin products, and fresh capital has effectively
stopped arriving on-chain according to Glassnode.

The pressure is not random. Institutional money is chasing
record equity highs instead. Strategy's surprise Bitcoin sale
shifted the narrative. And beneath the selloff, a structural
debate is building about whether Ethereum has a fundamental
advantage over Bitcoin that the market is only beginning to price
in.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Standard Chartered Says ETH Is Starting to Outperform BTC

Standard Chartered called June 1 the start of Ethereum
outperforming Bitcoin, triggered by Strategy's Bitcoin sale. ETH
rose roughly 5% against BTC even as crypto broadly fell.

ETH generates staking yield near 3% annually. Bitcoin treasury
firms earn nothing and may need to sell to meet their
obligations.

What ETH to BTC ratio does Standard Chartered expect by
year-end?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/6jCy566cd9v2s99WeANUvw~~/AAQRxRA~/UNdfxqrlXeI5r03mfnl8-9VAcWWPKR5UcURR6eN4rNK5Gz2zZXAuFLR5uGf-4zKb37RND-qwMX14mTnXWifMrXKUHSpvT9_0WTXx0jHpvpvZJNJFRtrZJYGYQeJJ_4pabRGSr8Td7crg8amOrfcxGRK6WDd7EHaVWzFBa5myGPyNDtDqaaxUN8qJlDYoBb

73990.subject: Why many women cannot make enough breast milk
73990.body:
The Economist’s week ahead

Автор: The Economist


Автор: The Economist

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-many-women-cannot-make-enough-breast-milk-the-economist-swhye?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BcZdiPwtqTpiMvIGr9VtZ6w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0YlumdJjwbPsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpxywoak~va-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpxywoak-va
  
Sign up for free here to receive this newsletter in your inbox every Saturday. You’ll also get our weekly newsletter with an exclusive introduction from our editor-in-chief. I’ve written about lots of things that are over-medicalised, including back pain and ADHD. But breastfeeding, as I discovered in the course of reporting a story about it, suffers from the opposite problem: it needs a lot more medical attention. Rare is the woman who has no trouble breastfeeding. Yet researchers have done little to understand their problems. There are just 300 or so studies on low milk supply in women (14,000 if you include research on animals like dairy cows)—compared with 32,000 studies on erectile dysfunction. There is even less research on how to solve such problems. As a result, many women give up in the first few weeks—often in tears, having tried everything. In a recent episode of “The Weekend Intelligence” podcast I investigated why science and medicine have failed them, through the lens of my personal experience. I talked to the researchers whose discoveries may soon change that.  Slavea Chankova, Health-care correspondent Editor’s picks Why many women cannot make enough breast milk The causes are often beyond their control Mothers who cannot breastfeed have been given terrible advice Medicine has neglected mammary glands for too long Breast milk’s benefits are not limited to babies Some of its myriad components are being tested as treatments for cancer and other diseases Baby formulas now share some ingredients with breast milk They may one day replicate its benefits There is more to breasts than meets the eye A book offers a cultural history of mammary glands Go beyond the headlines Get unlimited digital access to The Economist by subscribing today.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-many-women-cannot-make-enough-breast-milk-the-economist-swhye?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BcZdiPwtqTpiMvIGr9VtZ6w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0YlumdJjwbPsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mpxywoak~va-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpxywoak-va
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідо

73989.subject: Automatická správa: Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky
73989.body:
Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky pre vozidlo s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI 
  
  
 Vážený Zákazník, 
  
 správca výberu úhrady diaľničných známok za užívanie vymedzených úsekov diaľnic a rýchlostných ciest v Slovenskej republike, Vám prostredníctvom tejto automaticky vygenerovanej e-mailovej správy na základe Vami realizovanej úhrady diaľničnej známky, evidovanej v rámci evidencie úhrad diaľničných známok k vozidlu/prípojnému vozidlu s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI a krajinou registrácie Slovensko, zasiela doklad „Potvrdenie o úhrade diaľničnej známky, zjednodušená faktúra". 
Diaľničná známka je platná v období odo dňa 03.06.2026 do dňa 03.06.2026 vrátane. 
  
 Upozornenie: 
  
 
Na túto automaticky vygenerovanú e-mailovú správu neodpovedajte. Bližšie informácie týkajúce sa diaľničnej známky môžete získať na internetovom portáli www.eznamka.sk a/alebo prostredníctvom zákazníckej linky na tel. čísle +421 232 777 777. 
  
 S pozdravom
 
  
 Národná diaľničná spoločnosť, a.s. 
  
 T: +421 232 777 777
W: www.eznamka.sk

73988.subject:
Binance NFT Upgrade to Binance Wallet and Limited Time Withdrawal
 Fee Reimbursement
73988.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light !important; supported-color-schemes: light !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .hidden-desktop { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-desktop { display: block !important; } div.mj-group-full-width { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { .hidden-mobile { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-mobile { display: block !important; } } This is a general announcement. Products and services referred to here may not be available in your region.   Fellow Binancians, To provide a more seamless and integrated NFT experience, we are upgrading the Binance NFT service to be made available on Binance Wallet, where users can manage their NFTs with easier access to Web3 and decentralized features. Starting 2026-06-03 , users holding transferable NFTs on Binance will have one month to withdraw their NFTs to their Binance Wallet or any other compatible wallets of their choice to continue managing their digital assets. Once the upgrade is complete on 2026-07-03 , users will no longer access support for the current NFT service on Binance Exchange and any NFTs not withdrawn by then will no longer be accessible. During this withdrawal period, we will proactively reach out to and remind transferable NFT holders to ensure a smooth process. Non-transferrable NFTs were coded to be non-transferrable from the onset and cannot be withdrawn. These non-transferrable NFTs will no longer be accessible after 2026-07-03 . Binance Academy will issue PDF certificates to holders of non-transferrable NFTs that certified completion of Binance Academy courses.  NFT Withdrawal Fee Reimbursement Promotion Binance is offering two NFT withdrawal fee reimbursement promotions during this upgrade: General NFT Withdrawal Fee Reimbursement Promotion for non-CR7 NFTs CR7 NFT Withdrawal Reimbursement General NFT Withdrawal Fee Reimbursement Promotion   A total of up to 100,000 users will be selected to receive reimbursements. Each selected user will receive 1 USDC for an eligible NFT withdrawal . 1 US

73985.subject: Вам когда-нибудь казалось, что вы родились не там?🤔
73985.body:
Ваша натальная карта знает, где ваше место силы ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  
 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Здравствуйте, Олег! Уверена, вы хотя бы раз замечали такое в своём окружении: человек, который годами ходил по кругу. Не было ни роста, ни перемен, ни ощущения, что жизнь движется вперёд. Работа не та, отношения не те, энергии нет. И так год за годом.
А потом -- переезд. В другую страну, в другой город. И всё. Как будто кто-то нажал reset. Новая работа, новые люди, новая она. Расцвела буквально за год.
Вы смотрели на это и думали: как так получилось? Она ведь не изменилась. Та же самая личность. Почему там -- и вдруг всё? Ответ вас удивит.
Ваша натальная карта фиксирует точное положение планет в момент вашего рождения. Большинство людей используют её, чтобы понять себя -- свои сильные стороны, паттерны, то, как они любят и работают.
 Найти своё место в мире [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Каждая планета прокладывает линию по всему глобусу. И там, где вы живёте, путешествуете или проводите много времени -- вы активируете определённую энергию. Одни линии раскрывают вас. Другие тихо работают против -- сколько бы вы ни старались. Это астрокартография.
Именно она объясняет, почему тот человек из вашего окружения расцвёл после переезда. Не потому что он изменился. А потому что оказался в своём месте.
И у вас тоже есть такое место. Возможно, вы уже живёте в нём. Возможно, оно совсем рядом. Или на другом конце света.
Вопрос только в том -- знаете ли вы, где оно.
 Найти своё место в мире [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Мы создали персональный письменный анализ, который точно отвечает на вопрос: где ваше место силы прямо сейчас и почему.
С учётом всех активных транзитов 2025-2026 -- не абстрактно, а лично для вас и д

73982.subject: Uber had enough of its Claude usage
73982.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Uber runs on AI, and it just put its own engineers on a spending limit because it can't prove the bill is worth it. Meanwhile OpenAI wants your whole office building apps in Codex, no developers required. Microsoft used its Build stage to show it can make its own frontier models instead of borrowing OpenAI's. And GitLab is cutting 14% of its staff for the "agentic era" after AI's biggest names swore it isn't taking jobs.

———————————————————————————

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Uber's AI cap:** Why is one of the most AI-hungry companies in tech putting its own engineers on a budget?

* **Codex for non-coders:** What can your marketing team ship now without waiting on a developer?

* **Microsoft at Build:** What did Microsoft actually launch this week?

* **GitLab's 14%:** Who keeps insisting AI won't take jobs while the layoffs pile up?


----------

----------
## [Uber is rationing the AI it told everyone to use](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-02/uber-caps-usage-of-ai-tools-like-claude-code-to-cut-costs)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/cc12a6ba-c658-4339-b645-083505aa849b/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_3.png?t=1780476225)
Caption: 

Uber just capped how much its engineers can spend on AI coding tools, because it can't prove the spending works. 

Each employee now gets $1,500 a month per tool for agents like Claude Code and Cursor, tracked on an internal dashboard, and anyone who needs more has to ask permission.

We covered the setup last month. Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI budget in four months, and COO Andrew Macdonald called it a **head-exploding** moment. 

More code was shipping, but he couldn't draw a line from the tokens to better rides. "That link is not there yet," he said.

The overspend wasn't an accident. Uber ran an internal leaderboard that ranked teams by how much AI they used, so people did exactly what they were rewarded for. 

CEO Dara Khosrowshahi says agents now write about 10% of Uber's code.

A cap stops the bleeding. Uber rewarded usage and got usage. Paying for outcomes instead of tokens is the harder problem places like Uber are facing right now.


----------



----------
## [A Google-trained expert drops a free tutorial on Claude agents](https://utm.genai.works/r/h9t05s3)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/imag
